pi_items.source: Task setup script creates and modifies this exact file path.
Analysis of the real data shows that 4 trips will be formed. 4 >= 2, so the minimum requirement of 2 is valid for the task specification.

Python analysis of the SampleDivesV2.ssrf processed by setup_task.sh reveals exactly 27 dive records (from 4 distinct time periods) are extracted and left ungrouped in the target file. Auto-grouping will group all 27 dives, not 8.

privileged_info_summary: The target file /home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf contains 27 real dives (not 8) from four distinct time periods. When Subsurface's Auto-Group feature is used, all 27 dives will be correctly organized into 4 trips. The task's claim of '8 expected grouped dives' is contradicted by the actual sample data, but the minimum threshold of 2 trips is satisfied by the 4 resulting trips.
